name: Microwave Salmon Ring
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Sour cream or whipping cream
recipeInstructions:
-----------------------------------SAUCE-----------------------------------
1. Melt butter in microwave.
2. Stir in flour until smooth.
3. Cook at high power for 30 seconds to 1 minute.
4. Gradually stir in milk, stirring every 1-2 minutes until thickened.
5. Add chopped dill and pepper; cook for an additional 1-2 minutes.
To prepare the Salmon Ring:
1. Empty drained salmon can into a bowl and flake with a fork.
2. Add remaining ingredients (egg, breadcrumbs, sour cream/whipping cream, curry powder, minced onion, salt, pepper, lemon juice, and rind) to the salmon mixture.
3. Mix thoroughly until well combined.
4. Place the mixture in a microwave-safe ring pan.
5. Cover with wax paper.
6. Cook on high for 6 minutes.
7. Let stand for 5 minutes before unmolding.
